title: Smelly Drain Cleaner Tablets, 25 Pack Sink Drain Cleaner Quickly Eliminates Odors, Drains Smell Eliminator for Sewer, Toilet and Septic Tank, Sink Smell Eliminator Effervescent Tablets, 1 Year Supply
features: POWERFUL DEODORIZATION AND DECONTAMINATION: Say goodbye to the odor troubles in the sewer! Our drain smell eliminator can quickly penetrate deep into the pipes, easily remove dirt and odors, and restore freshness to the kitchen and bathroom. No need to worry about the odor of the sewer, fast and effective, the air is refreshed!

EASY TO USE: The operation is super simple! Just put the smelly drain cleaner into the sink or bathtub pipe, then pour in 60-degree hot water and wait for 10-20 minutes. When used in the toilet, put it directly in and flush it after it dissolves. The drain unblocker effervescent tablet "works magic" in the water pipe, you can relax and wait, and enjoy the freshness easily!

SAFE FORMULA, WORRY-FREE: Our sink smell eliminator uses natural ingredients, no irritating odors or substances, gentle and safe. Make every corner of the house fresh, whether there are children, pets, or the elderly at home, you can breathe with confidence.

INDEPENDENT PACKAGING, SUPER LONG USE: Each piece of our sink drain cleaner is individually packaged, there is no need to worry about premature dissolution due to moisture, and there is no need to worry about becoming crushed during delivery and dirtying the house, which is convenient for storage. One box can provide a year's use, which is super cost-effective and convenient. Buy it once and use it for a long time!

USAGE TIPS: For best results, please avoid using these drain smell eliminator tablets on pipes made of copper, cast iron, rubber, etc. For stubborn odors, the cleaning effect may vary. Use as needed to ensure the best results!

INTIMATE AFTER-SALES GUARANTEE: Our after-sales service is super considerate! If you have any questions or problems with our smelly drain cleaner you received, feel free to contact us and we will provide you with a quick solution so that you can use it worry-free every time!
description: From the brand Previous page About Halldeli At Halldeli, we believe freshness should start from the source—your drains. Our advanced cleaning tablets break down hidden grime and neutralize stubborn odors, restoring lasting cleanliness with ease. Designed for modern homes, Halldeli blends efficiency, safety, and simplicity. One drop, deep action—let freshness flow with Halldeli. Next page
